name: sorbonne-universite.fr
message: [AI generated] Sorbonne Université is a prestigious French higher education institution located in Paris, established in 2018 by merging Pierre et Marie Curie University and Paris-Sorbonne University. It provides a wide range of study programs, including sciences, medicine, humanities, and arts. Alongside teaching, it's known for its strong focus on research and innovation. Its alumni and faculty include multiple Nobel laureates and Fields Medalists.
